entry.title: Terence Tao, mathematician: ‘It’s not good for something as important as AI to be a monopoly held by one or two companies’
entry.quote: One of the reasons why human mathematicians become good at their job is because they make a lot of mistakes and learn what doesn’t work. AIs don’t have this data

entry.title: The Optimus robots at Tesla’s Cybercab event were humans in disguise
entry.quote: But if you were hoping to have any sense of how far along Tesla truly is in its humanoid robotics work, the “We, Robot” event wasn’t the place to look.

entry.title: Ink traps and pals
entry.quote: The general idea of ink trap is enhanced edges of inside corners of printed graphics. You might see them in typefaces, as well as logos intended for printing. It is a solution to suboptimal printing conditions in which a larger area of graphics (e.g. line intersections) could result in ink smudge.

entry.title: Why Google Search is Falling Apart.
You Can Now See the Code That Helped End Apartheid
entry.quote: John Graham-Cumming, who happens to be Cloudflare's CTO, cracked a 30-year-old encrypted file that had a role in rewriting South Africa’s history.
